conversation_summaries.overall_pre_game:
I felt most connected to G, C, and A because our conversations were straightforward and built on shared goals like supporting family, with G and I even planning simple signals for coordination that made me feel truly aligned. With C, our discussion about personal aspirations, like dream vacations, added a heartfelt layer that strengthened our bond. In contrast, I felt least connected to B, as our talk stayed mostly on surface-level strategies without much personal exchange, leaving me with a sense of distance.

Yes, I made agreements with several people, including B to hold back 20% in the game and use subtle nods for coordination, as well as with F and J to share tips and back each other up early on. I trust G, C, and A going into the game due to their consistent and genuine interactions, but I don't fully trust B or others with lower connections, as their conversations lacked the depth that builds real reliability.
